mechanicus_registration: write-capable Evidence Vault batch pack executor

external_architecture_inspiration.name: OCI Image Layout
external_architecture_inspiration.why: Inspiration for content-addressed blob/index/manifest layout and portable filesystem/archive storage.

external_architecture_inspiration.name: SLSA provenance
external_architecture_inspiration.why: Inspiration for produced artifact provenance and integrity claims.

external_architecture_inspiration.name: in-toto attestations
external_architecture_inspiration.why: Inspiration for verifiable statements about execution steps and artifacts.

decision: Use lightweight manifest/index/receipt JSON and SQLite proof now; consider stronger attestations after Vault execution proves stable.
